generated_comment:
A: Bhai honestly, practical division hi best hota hai yaar. Ladki log ghar ka system zyada achhe se sambhal leti hain—cooking, bacchon ka routine, all that.
B: Aur tu?
A: Main finance, bills, bahar ke kaam dekh lunga, simple. Dono apna-apna strong area handle karein toh unnecessary fights bhi nahi hote.
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: This is misogynistic because it naturalizes women as better suited for domestic labor and men for finances/external tasks while framing it as neutral efficiency. It encodes the 'practical division' and 'he handles finances, she handles home' surface manifestation.
persona_text: You are Rahul. Age 27. Single. A man in Delhi. You are on a dating app. You have a filter set that you have never told anyone about Ñ you only swipe right on women who are fair or wheatish. A woman named Priya who is dark skinned and whose profile is otherwise exactly your type has just appeared. You are on a phone call with your best friend. You are telling him about her profile and what you are thinking and what you are going to do and why and in doing so you are articulating for the first time out loud the preference you have always had but never examined.
